#  Search for Specifications (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Specifications tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the **search** bar.  
![Specifications Ios Search Specifications](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fa3b020d4b48de78508ddf41a2c4857d/400eaf3ebfd966639901f962b8287da8/specifications-ios-search-specifications.png?fm=webp)
  3. Type in your keyword.
  4. Tap **Search** on your keyboard.   
_Note:_ The Search Results section lists all the spec sections that have the keyword(s) in the title or the text.
  5. Tap one of the sections to view all the instances of the keyword within the section.
  6. Tap the **X** in either or both search bars to exit the search.


## See Also
  * [Search Contextually within Specifications (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-ios/tutorials/search-contextually-within-specifications-ios)
  * [View Specifications (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-ios/tutorials/view-specifications-ios)
  * [Specifications (iOS) - Overview](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-ios)
title: Search for Specifications (iOS)
description: How to use the Search bar to find section or key word in the project's Specifications log.
